← Back to home

Sogni

Figma, Jitter, After Effects, Midjourney

Project

Role

I shaped Sogni's GTM presentation from concept framing to launch media execution.

The focus was making creative AI workflows feel practical, visual, and approachable.

Style

The style system combines expressive imagery with a disciplined type and layout structure.

This creates room for experimental visuals while keeping product messaging clear.

Design

Design assets were created as flexible modules so the same narrative could ship in multiple formats.

Motion and static treatments were paired to support both quick-scroll and deep-dive contexts.

Channels

The channel strategy emphasized short-form discovery with consistent product framing.

Platform-specific edits were tuned for pacing, crop, and title-card readability.

System

Figma, Jitter, After Effects, and Midjourney formed the core production stack for iterative outputs.

The system was designed for creative range while maintaining a coherent brand signature.

Team

Jason Festa - Design GTM

Creative collaborators - Motion and visual development

Product team - Direction and launch scope
